title: Editor Action — External Editor Bridge Contract
description: Defines the contract for opening files in external editors from Code Mode UI and diff views.

action.description: open = open file at line; open_diff = open diff view in editor

session_id.description: If provided, opens file in session worktree/sandbox path

path.description: Relative file path from workspace root

editor.description: Target editor. Auto detects running editor.

mechanism.description: How to invoke the editor. cli = 'code -g file:line:col'; uri_scheme = vscode://...
